measurement_note: Size is A, the number of UserActivity rows. Every benchmark user has four chronologically ordered activities, so the selected row is the third month. The window query partitions and sorts all rows in O(A log A) time. A correct slower query runs de-indexed correlated counts of later and total activities for every candidate row, taking O(A^2) time; the 16/64/256-row tiers complete normally.

cases.name: benchmark: 4 users with four activities each
benchmark: 16 users with four activities each
benchmark: 64 users with four activities each
